finding_results.notes: Reworked the boardwalk exchange to separate idiolect under pressure: Marisol now carries high-contraction, high-pressure rebuttal cadence with self-interruptions, while Gloria uses compact command turns anchored in concrete practical detail (work-history correction, recording conditions, mobility risk). finding_results.summary: Dialogue now differentiates Marisol and Gloria in syntax/rhythm, includes interruption-based leverage shifts for each speaker, maintains colloquial contraction use for Marisol's early rebuttals, and grounds Gloria's rebuttals in practical proof.
